title: Crispy Spanish Prawns Stir-fry
description: A sweet and crispy keto-friendly dish featuring prawns that are blanched and served with a tangy sauce for a cozy and flavorful meal.

ingredients.name: Prawns
ingredients.notes: Gently rinse under cold water to remove any excess moisture

ingredients.name: Olive oil
ingredients.notes: Choose a mild flavored olive oil for this recipe

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: For seasoning the prawns and sauce

instructions: Prepare the prawns by rinsing them and patting them dry with paper towels. Season each shrimp lightly with salt.
In a small saucepan, combine water or chicken stock, red wine vinegar, sugar, olive oil, garlic, and red pepper flakes if using. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Add the prawns to the boiling liquid and blanch for about 1 minute until they turn bright pink and are still firm. Remove from heat immediately.
While the prawns are blanching, mix together the sauce ingredients in another pan with olive oil. Heat over medium-high heat until the mixture is bubbling but not smoking hot.
Place the prawns on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil and drizzle them lightly with olive oil. Season generously with salt.
Sear the prawns for about 30 seconds per side, turning carefully to coat evenly in the sauce. Reduce heat to medium-low if they start to burn.
When done, remove from the oven and let rest for a few minutes before serving warm or at room temperature.
